title: Statements & Remarks | U.S. Department of the Treasury
summary: This is a listing page aggregating Treasury Secretary statements and remarks from December 2025 through March 2026, including congressional testimony and Economic Club speeches. The actual full-text content of individual statements is not included in this source; only titles and dates are provided. No archiveable research content can be extracted from this index page alone.
key_points: Source is a listing/index page, not an archiveable article
Contains multiple dated entries from Secretary Scott Bessent spanning Dec 2025 to Mar 2026
Includes congressional testimony before Senate Banking Committee (Feb 4, 2026) and House Financial Services Committee (Feb 5, 2026)
Includes Economic Club speeches in Dallas (Feb 20, 2026) and Minnesota (Jan 8, 2026)
Actual speech and statement content is not present in this source
URL field is blank in source metadata

Individual statements on topics such as economic security, financial literacy, and Somali fraud enforcement cannot be evaluated without accessing the full texts.
